rationale: TASK-069 acceptance is met: web Control Room header has a settings cog; it opens an in-app Settings panel without adding Settings to the left rail; `/api/settings` maps `.codewiki/config.json` into grouped rows with option path, value, category/purpose, source path, and editability cue; major config groups are covered; config remains source truth and read-only in the UI; smoke tests assert the cog, settings API, and simplified left rail.
